steps.title: Recognize what the passage presents
steps.content: The passage concludes with Flewellen's claim that the women “balanced hegemonic ideals of femininity with the requirements of their physically demanding occupation.” This reveals what the passage does: present research findings about factors that influenced a fashion practice.

steps.title: Match the purpose
steps.content:
D captures the passage's purpose: it summarizes research findings about factors (fashion ideals and work demands) that influenced the practice. The others either address fashion change rates not discussed (A), claim resistance when the passage emphasizes balance (B), or mistake summary for evaluation of scholarly work (C).
That matches choice D — D is correct.
